notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, shortstop Xander Bogaerts to second baseman Sung-Mun Song to first baseman Ty France. A.J. Ewing out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Brett Baty.
